fresh.body:

fresh_2.body:
Quick follow-up - a client of mine is researching {{goal}}. It'd be a 30-60 min paid call, just your high-level experience, nothing confidential.

The project is moving fast on the client's side, so happy to share details now if useful. No worries if it's not a fit. Just let me know and I won't follow up again.

All the best,
Ben

backend_pro_first_copy_1.body:
Hope you're well. I'm working on a project for a client researching {{goal}}. Your background looked strong — would you be open to a quick consult at your rate of $400/hr?

If so, answer the questions below in a sentence or two each and I'll take it from there.

  • Can you speak to the value proposition of your competitors, specifically Omnicom?
  • Can you speak to what is uniquely different about ​your company​ over Omnicom?
  • What are some industry trends that you can speak to?

All the best,
Ben

backend_pro_first_copy_2.body:
Thank you for being a part of the Tegus by AlphaSense expert network!

We have a client interested in researching {{goal}}, and I thought you'd be a great fit for this project. I wanted to check if you're interested in being considered and to confirm your experience with this project's details.

Below are the client’s qualifying questions. Please respond with 1-3 sentences so I can recommend your profile to the client.

Is your rate still $400 per hour?

  • Can you speak to the value proposition of your competitors, specifically Omnicom?
  • Can you speak to what is uniquely different about ​your company​ over Omnicom?
  • What are some industry trends that you can speak to?

{{outro}}

All the best,
Ben
